vbu-projects-agent.description: VBU Projects Agent MCP server — exposes project context, ADO metrics, progress, and snapshot tools

hooks.command: python -c "from vbu_projects_agent.security.scanner import scan_file_content; import sys; content=open(sys.argv[1]).read() if len(sys.argv)>1 else ''; scan_file_content(content, 'hook-prewrite')" "${file}" 2>/dev/null || true
